sql_array: CREATE TABLE http_requests (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url VARCHAR(255), response_body VARCHAR(1000));
INSERT INTO http_requests (id, url, response_body) VALUES (1, 'http://example.com', http_client_ext('http://example.com'));
UPDATE http_requests SET response_body = http_client_ext('http://example.org') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, url, response_body FROM http_requests WHERE url LIKE 'http://%';
